message:
Fix: Add shebang to dist files for proper executable execution

The dist/index.js and dist/cli.js files were missing proper shebangs,
causing them to be executed as shell scripts instead of Node.js.

Using esbuild's --banner:js option escapes the shebang, so we use
Python to prepend it cleanly after the build.

This fixes MCP server startup when invoked via npx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
